info.title: Tapa Transport Platform API
info.description: REST API for Tapa's transport operations platform. It supports multi-role identity, agency operations, journeys, ticketing, parcels, encrypted wallets, bulk passenger manifests, waitlists, live trip events, and operational observability.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, verification, login, refresh, logout, password recovery, and passkeys

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Current user profile and internal user directory

tags.name: Agencies
tags.description: Agency registration, ownership, and staff assignment

tags.name: Journeys
tags.description: Journey search, seat availability, stop progression, and alighting confirmation

tags.name: Tickets
tags.description: Ticket purchase, cancellation, and passenger history

tags.name: Parcels
tags.description: Parcel creation, tracking, and delivery status updates

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Encrypted wallet setup, balance access, and transactions

tags.name: Bulk Bookings
tags.description: Organization manifests, QR boarding, and safe-arrival workflow

tags.name: Waitlist
tags.description: Seat waitlist registration and status checks

tags.name: Operations
tags.description: Health checks, cache insights, metrics, and external verification mocks

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token returned by the auth endpoints

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Required for wallet mutations and ticket mutations. Reusing a key with a different payload returns a conflict.

details.description: Optional structured validation or domain details

masterQR.description: QR code returned as a PNG data URL produced by the QR helper

id.description: Binary user handle encoded by the WebAuthn library

get.summary: Cache health and cache metrics snapshot

post.description: Creates a user and an empty wallet record, then triggers email verification and OTP delivery.
Password reset clears active refresh sessions. If a wallet exists, its balance is reinitialized to zero because the old wallet key cannot be recovered safely.

get.description: JWT-protected flow for an already authenticated user. The server stores the generated registration challenge in Redis for 5 minutes before verification.

post.description: Consumes the raw `RegistrationResponseJSON` returned by the browser. On success, the passkey public key and counter are persisted to the `Passkey` table and the controller returns `{ "verified": true }`.

get.description: Public flow that requires a `userId` query parameter. The server loads the user's registered passkeys, generates an authentication challenge, and stores it in Redis for 5 minutes.

post.description: Consumes the raw browser credential plus `userId`. On success, the stored passkey counter is advanced and the controller returns `{ "verified": true }`.

get.description: Accessible to OWNER and MANAGER roles.

post.description: OWNER only. Calls the configured RURA verification service before persisting the agency.

post.summary: Assign manager to agency and station
post.description: OWNER only.
OWNER only.
OWNER only.
OWNER only.
OWNER only.
MANAGER only.
Available to the trip's assigned driver, the owning agency manager, or an OWNER. Emits real-time passenger alighting information.
Available to the trip's assigned driver or the owning agency manager. Triggers waitlist processing for the freed seat.

get.description: CLIENT only. Requires a fully verified account.

post.description: CLIENT only. Requires a fully verified account, a wallet password, and an `Idempotency-Key` header.

409.description: Seat taken, temporarily reserved, or insufficient funds

post.description: CLIENT only. Requires a fully verified account and an `Idempotency-Key` header.

get.summary: Track parcel by public tracking code

patch.description: Allowed for DRIVER, MANAGER, and OWNER.

post.summary: Initialize wallet encryption password or PIN
post.description: Requires a fully verified account and an `Idempotency-Key` header.
Requires a fully verified account. The server validates the wallet password before decrypting the balance.
Requires a fully verified account and an `Idempotency-Key` header.
Requires a fully verified account and an `Idempotency-Key` header.

post.summary: Unlock wallet (cache derived key in Redis for 15 min)
post.description: Verifies wallet password, derives AES-256 key via PBKDF2, and caches it in Redis for 15 minutes. Subsequent operations can use the cached key instead of re-entering the wallet password.
Verifies old wallet password, decrypts balance, re-encrypts with new password, and clears the unlock cache.
Accessible to ORGANIZATION, MANAGER, and OWNER roles. Generates a master QR, passenger boarding hashes, and HMAC-backed manifest integrity data.

post.summary: Validate master or passenger boarding scan
post.description: Accessible to DRIVER and MANAGER roles.

post.summary: Mark bulk passenger as safely arrived
post.description: Accessible to DRIVER and MANAGER roles.
CLIENT only. Requires a fully verified account. User joins a stop-specific FIFO queue backed by Redis sorted sets.

get.description: CLIENT only. Requires a fully verified account.
